## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between AfterShoot and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, publishing workflow, and optimization plans.](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Accelerate publishing process: Focus on well-written, structured content with internal links and images; publish, then iterate improvements](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Product-led content strategy: Develop outlines for diverse photography niches (e.g., weddings, sports, concerts) focusing on key features like culling and retouching](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Content optimization: GrowthX to identify and refresh previously published blog posts to improve SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [Workflow improvements: Implement draft posts in WordPress alongside Google Docs for faster editing and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

## Topics

### New Team Member Introduction

  - [Manaswini Rao joining AfterShoot as Marketing Manager next month](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Currently shadowing and getting familiar with the landscape](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Previously worked with Jakub at Facilio](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)

### Content Publishing Strategy

  - [Accelerate publishing to demonstrate SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Focus on well-written, structured content with internal links and couple of images](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Publish content, then iterate and improve over time](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Monalisa to review mirrorless blog post and product-like article today](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)

### Product-Led Content Development

  - [David created 5 outlines for product-focused articles](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Diversifying topics beyond weddings (e.g., culling for concerts, sports events)](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Outlines include: culling for birthday/sports photography, retouching (blemish removal, headshots), editing workflow for newborns](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Monalisa to share existing workflow articles (wedding, overall workflow, portrait editing) as reference](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

### Content Optimization Strategy

  - [GrowthX to help optimize previously published blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [Team to identify articles that have fallen off in rankings or are close to ranking well](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [GrowthX to create a list of articles to optimize by early next week](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Optimization may involve full rewrites, adding new sections, or minor tweaks](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [David to add draft posts directly to WordPress alongside Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Monalisa to review and comment on Google Docs; David to make edits in WordPress](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [For small edits, David can make changes directly in WordPress with color-coded text for easy review](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

### Image Guidelines

  - [Use dashboard screenshots for product images](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Ensure consistent sizing and professional appearance](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Use white or red arrows/pointers to highlight features](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Monalisa to review and publish retouching draft on WordPress tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [David to check and update screenshots in articles based on Monalisa's guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [GrowthX to send revised product outlines and create a list of articles to optimize by early next week](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Team to continue developing new content while simultaneously optimizing existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide Monalisa with a list of data needed for keyword research and content development](https://fathom.video/share/qWS2KabVZ6_oih8AVzBzpk_bLn4zKzDW?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
